factual_layer.problem: A prepared PAW adapter over the frozen 0.6B interpreter is not a reliable fact store; it answered 'major cities of South Korea' with Seoul, Gangnam (a Seoul district), Incheon, and Gimpo, omitting Busan and Daegu.
factual_layer.resolution: Added an offline curated factual-pack layer (app/services/factual_packs) that answers structured questions deterministically with provenance and takes precedence over the neural answerer.
factual_layer.benchmark: backend/eval/country_facts (dev + held-out test, held-out countries disjoint from dev)
factual_layer.held_out_status: countries without a pack are intentionally unanswered by the pack layer and fall back to the neural answerer; factual grounding must be built per country
phases_remaining: user-prepared packs with DB persistence and evaluation-gated promotion
optional larger local synthesis model, benchmark-selected
release CI gate consuming a machine-generated factual report

methodology_correction.selection_rule: maximize relative expected answer quality; require 100% answer rate but not 100% factual accuracy

prepared_topics.policy: explicit topic-name mentions match deterministically; otherwise evaluate every prepared topic with PAW; one match answers directly and multiple matches aggregate all matches

language_tasks.policy: use narrow programs only for matching interpretation or translation requests

followups.policy: standalone by default; context is used only when the user explicitly replies to an answer
followups.strategy: pass one bounded previous question-answer pair directly to the selected answer graph

rejected: behavior examples in the broad spec
broad plus one prepared specialist aggregation

broad_example_policy.decision: select prose-only because examples provide no measured gain

translation.decision: ship the imperfect example-trained specialist because it has the highest measured expected utility

generic_subject_oracle.decision: do not ship generic subjects; held-out lift is zero and manual review found additional factual or practical errors

prepared_ottoman.decision: wait for finetuning and use one matched prepared specialist directly

bounded_followups.decision: use bounded structured context; the PAW candidate's small answer-score difference did not clear the 0.05 development-lift or 0.90 rewrite-fidelity gates and it adds another model invocation

observed_country_preparation.korea_icml_gangnam_style: prepared matcher returned YES and the finetuned specialist ran, but both broad and prepared answers lacked the well-known Psy song and satire facts
observed_country_preparation.singapore_merlion: prepared matcher incorrectly returned NO despite an explicit Singapore mention; the finetuned specialist also remained factually incomplete when run directly
observed_country_preparation.decision: country preparation does not guarantee factual lift; preserve these as development candidates, route explicit topic names deterministically, and do not describe Ready as factual validation

compiler_findings.resolution: submit finetunes asynchronously and poll live remote percent instead of displaying fixed local stage percentages
